valid: For the period 18:00 (UTC) on Thu 25 Jun 2026 to 18:00 (UTC) on Fri 26 Jun 2026
general_synopsis: Low FitzRoy 1009 expected Shannon 1009 by midday tomorrow. High German Bight 1025 expected Baltic 1021 by same time. New highs 1017 and 1019 expected Hebrides and Portland by midday tomorrow
